title: 5 Pairs Canadian Leather Rigger Work Gloves Heavy Duty Safety Gauntlets Size XL
features: Heavy weight fabric and fleece palm liner make this glove very comfortable
Generously sized and superbly comfortable with a highly visible coloured back/safety cuff
Popular with The Council / Local Authorities, Construction Workers, Builders, Drivers and any other rough work environment
This glove is also commonly used as Gardening gloves
description: Canadian Leather Rigger Work Safety Glove is one of our most popular glove, the heavy weight fabric and fleece palm liner make this glove very comfortable to wear without affecting your dexterity. This product is for those having heavy jobs where added protection is essential. Two layers of well tanned contrast coloured leather combine where it's most needed - across the palm around the fore finger and across the thumb face to give tough yet supple support. Generously sized and superbly comfortable with a highly visible coloured back/safety cuff. This glove is popular with The Council / Local Authorities, Construction Workers, Metal workers, Builders, Drivers and any other rough work environment. This glove is also commonly used as Gardening gloves.
